active_phases.name: HTML explainer documents end-to-end
active_phases.objective: Make standalone self-contained HTML explainer documents a first-class KB document type: the document API accepts them, the web app renders them safely with their interactivity (quiz JS) working, search indexes their extracted text, and the MCP read path handles them sanely — alongside existing markdown docs.

active_phases.name: Explain skill v2: interactive HTML + public multi-user ingestion
active_phases.objective: Upgrade the explain skill (plugin canonical, all copies) to always emit a gist-style self-contained interactive HTML explainer (Background/Intuition/Code/Quiz) for both topic and code-change modes — including a default-on, citation-backed 'Best practices & next steps' section from web research (skipped when the subject has no external comparison surface or offline) — and wire ingestion to the publicly deployed KB so every knowledge user posts explainers to their own tenant with their own key, closing the prod accounts/auth deploy gap as required.

active_phases.name: Accounts v2: user/org/project with org-level keys
active_phases.objective: Restructure the accounts plane to an explicit user → org → project model: signup auto-provisions a "default" org and "default" project; API keys become mintable at org level (making today's de-facto tenant-wide enforcement honest); project resolution is get-or-create by name; knowledge save keeps the repo-basename default with a --project override and "default" fallback. Org creation + member invites stay out of scope (deferred).

active_phases.name: Public projects & direct doc links
active_phases.objective: Add per-project public/private visibility: public projects' docs and graph are readable by anonymous visitors and other users (the graph exposes only public-project nodes to outsiders), and every save returns a working direct URL to the doc — replacing the legacy mkdocs url field — shareable when the project is public.

active_phases.name: Frictionless onboarding: hero, install, env-var quickstart, skill on landing
active_phases.objective: Make the landing hero flow real end to end: fix the broken uv tool install knowledge-cli line (publish to PyPI or switch the copy to the working install form), make the depicted init/password step honest (show the prompt or generate a password), promote the env-var REST setup (KB_API_BASE_URL/KB_API_TOKEN) as the recommended agent path with blockers addressed, and publish the explain skill on the landing page — copyable and downloadable — with agent-first guidance.
